sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53503" key="ka/rth" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάρτη</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, a kind of <sense id="n53503.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">garment</tr_>, Juba Hist.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">85</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
